title: AEP NAMES MARTIN VICE PRESIDENT OF INFRASTRUCTURE ENGINEERING, IT OPERATIONS AND SUPPORT
text: COLUMBUS, Ohio , May 31, 2022 /PRNewswire/ -- American Electric Power (Nasdaq: AEP) has named Steven Martin vice president, Infrastructure Engineering, IT Operations & Support, effective May 30. He reports to Therace Risch, executive vice president and chief information & technology officer.

title: SWEPCO SEEKS APPROVAL FOR THREE NEW WIND AND SOLAR PROJECTS
text: $2.2 billion investment part of SWEPCO'S ongoing efforts to secure renewable energy resources COLUMBUS, Ohio , May 31, 2022 /PRNewswire/ -- Southwestern Electric Power Company (SWEPCO), a subsidiary of American Electric Power (Nasdaq: AEP), has announced plans to add three renewable energy projects totaling 999 megawatts (MW). The projects represent a $2.2 billion investment in clean, cost-effective resources.

title: American Electric Power: Waiting For A Better Price
text: The electric utility's operating EPS payout ratio will only slightly expand from 63.3% in 2021 to 63.8% in 2022. American Electric Power delivered 7% operating revenue growth in the first quarter, while its operating EPS advanced 6.1% higher year-over-year during the quarter.

title: AEP Releases 2022 Corporate Sustainability Report
text: COLUMBUS, Ohio , May 19, 2022 /PRNewswire/ -- American Electric Power (Nasdaq: AEP) has issued its 2022 Corporate Sustainability Report, an annual assessment of its performance as a public company and a community partner. This report marks AEP's 16th year of environmental, social and governance (ESG) disclosure, demonstrating its commitment to reporting the company's progress toward a sustainable energy future.

title: AEP NAMES SHANE LIES TO LEAD COOK NUCLEAR PLANT
text: COLUMBUS, Ohio , May 5, 2022 /PRNewswire/ -- Shane Lies has been named senior vice president and chief nuclear officer of American Electric Power's (Nasdaq: AEP) Donald C. Cook Nuclear Plant (Cook) in Bridgman, Michigan, effective July 1, 2022.
